title: It Takes a Pillage
body:
## 📖 About: > *A Pillager mod for 1.16.5+ aiming to expand on the pillager civilization, as well as provide additional challenges and compelling gameplay in the survival game mode.* The Pillagers have expanded their Civilization! They have set up encampments and fortresses all over the world! Do you have what it takes to overcome these new threats, and seize their precious loot? See the Images Tab for Spoilers! Listen to the soundtrack on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/izofar). This is my first mod in release. Check out my others, and keep an eye out for more!. **Please considering supporting me below, as that will allow me more time for updates and fixes.** ## 🎥 Videos:
## ❗ Dependencies: * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.19.2.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.18.2.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.16.5.html) * No other mod dependencies! ## 📦 Integrations with other mods: Visit the [It Takes a Pillage page on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/it-takes-a-pillage) for the full integration list! ## 🕷 Report Bugs below: ## ✔️ Fixes to Old Issues: > tldr: update It Takes a Pillage and Forge! Visit the [It Takes a Pillage page on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/it-takes-a-pillage) for an extensive list of fix recommendations! ## Acknowledgements: Special Thanks to: Telepathic Grunt, Sizable Shrimp, Commoble, and Cadiboo from the Mod Development Discord for their assistance and direction during the development process. Special Thanks to: ZestyBlaze for the initial It Takes a Pillage Fabric Port!
